title: AddressResult
description: Contract for the `address` command's per-run Claude output (report.AddressResult): per addressed review thread, the follow-up change and its status, plus an overall summary and terminal status. This is the address session's own structured output, not a --format json stdout payload.

threads.description: Per-thread results, one per addressed review thread. Encoded as null (not []) when there are none.

files.description: Repo-relative paths the follow-up change touched. Omitted or null when nothing changed.
